specs.title: cp-000: Title Deep Research with Microscope icon blue accent
cp-001: Subtitle Multi-perspective literature synthesis
cp-002: Sticky top positioning
cp-003: Export buttons visible only in done state
cp-004: Save to Library button visible only in done state
cp-005: Stop button visible in running and plan-preview states red accent
cp-006: Heading What would you like to research
cp-007: Description Enter a research topic and we will synthesize findings from multiple
cp-008: Text input field with placeholder eg Efficacy of GLP-1 receptor agonists in type
cp-009: Client-side validation only checks for a non-empty trimmed topic 5500 character
cp-010: Empty input disables Start Deep Research button
cp-011: Enter key submits when topic filled no Shift key held
cp-012: Default mode pre-selected
cp-013: Clicking a mode highlights it
cp-014: Selected mode passed to API on submit
cp-015: Label Start Deep Research
cp-016: Disabled when topic is empty
cp-017: Triggers plan generation on click
cp-018: Starting research transitions the page into the plan-loading state the button it
cp-019: Past Research label with Clock icon in header styled uppercase via CSS tracking
cp-020: Fetches from GET apideep-researchsessions on mount
cp-021: Shows up to 20 past sessions latest first
cp-022: Topic text truncated
cp-023: Mode label capitalized
cp-024: Papers found count
cp-025: Relative date 2h ago 3d ago Jan 5
cp-026: Hover effect with blue icon
cp-027: ChevronRight icon on hover
cp-028: Clicking loads full session in done state
cp-029: Loading spinner while fetching sessions
cp-030: Hidden if no sessions exist
cp-031: Hidden on fetch error fails silently
cp-032: Header with Sparkles icon purple and Research Plan title
cp-033: Subtitle Review and customize the research perspectives before starting
cp-034: Numbered badges 1 2 3 etc in blue circles
